message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.eval (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame.eval string-
expression evaluation:

- eval_arithmetic: "a + b * 2" computes a Series result with operator
  precedence honored (mul before add)
- eval_comparison: "x > y" returns a boolean Series

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.eval(expr, local_dict={}) and emits expected_series), runs the
Rust fp_expr::eval_str(expr, &frame, &policy, &mut ledger), and
asserts parity via compare_series_expected. DataFrameEval was already
wired through the Series response branch; this fills the live-oracle
test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-739jy]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
